summary: Bootstrap triage completed. No external events are connected yet, so the loop remains in report-only warm-up mode.

new_items.title: Initialize Git repository before enabling branch/PR automation
new_items.body: Local workspace is not a Git repository. Branch, worktree, and PR automation must remain disabled until Git init and remote setup are complete.
new_items.triage_reason: Git-dependent automation is blocked by current local workspace state.

new_items.title: Connect GitHub/webhook/cron signals to start real triage ingestion
new_items.body: No incoming events exist yet. The loop needs GitHub webhooks and/or scheduled signal ingestion before it can triage repository health automatically.
new_items.triage_reason: Loop can run technically, but has no external signals to process yet.

watch_list: PostgreSQL loop state is online on localhost:15432.
Python runtime can already talk to the database through psycopg2.
Hermes cron jobs and GitHub webhooks are not configured yet.
noise: Initial triage was generated from bootstrap context only; no live GitHub or CI events yet.
